description_long: This cabinetry ensemble features a modern L-shaped kitchen layout with a combination of base cabinets, wall-mounted cabinets, and a tall pantry unit. The cabinetry is predominantly white with sleek black drawer and door fronts, creating a striking contrast. The setup includes a double-basin sink with two faucets, integrated into the countertop, and a separate island unit with a built-in electric cooktop. The wall cabinets have a glossy finish and are handleless, contributing to a minimalist aesthetic. The base cabinets and drawers are accented with slim, horizontal bar pulls, while the tall pantry unit provides ample vertical storage. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for urban residential or communal kitchen spaces.
description: A modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set with white and black finishes, featuring a tall pantry, wall cabinets, base cabinets, a double sink, and an island with a cooktop. The design is sleek, handleless on the wall units, and uses bar pulls on the base units.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shaped layout, double sink, tall pantry, wall cabinets, and the island with cooktop.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the island and the arrangement of drawers and cabinets beneath the countertop.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cabinetry, the tall pantry, and the upper wall cabinets without visible hardware.
description_view_3: Angled side view focusing on the island's cooktop and the side profile of the cabinetry ensemble.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped kitchen suite with tall pantry, base cabinets, wall cabinets, and island
attribute_door_configuration: combination of double door, single door, drawers, and open shelf
